commands.raw_help:
root@kali:~# nextnet -h
 Usage: nextnet [cidr] ... [cidr]
 
 Probes a list of networks for potential pivot points.
 
 Options:

    	Set the maximum packets per second rate (default 1000)
  -version
    	Show the application version

apt_metadata.description:
pivot point discovery tool in Go
This package contains a pivot point discovery tool written in Go.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use nextnet because ### nextnet.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `nextnet [cidr] ... [cidr]` as documented upstream for nextnet.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair nextnet with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `nextnet --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install nextnet. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `nextnet [cidr] ... [cidr]`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### nextnet.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install nextnet
